action: Approve the supplier Q3 review only with a 30-day remediation plan for the two remaining major findings.
rationale: S-AUDIT is the current signed audit applicable to the supplier Q3 review and requires conditional approval with a 30-day remediation plan. S-EMAIL was excluded because it is an informal sales email with lower authority than the signed audit. S-OLD was excluded because it is superseded and applies to the earlier Q2 review.
